stemHtml: Which scenario constitutes an example of the Alert Phase (ALERFA)?

options.a: An aircraft that has been cleared to land does not touch down within 5 minutes of its expected time of arrival, and radio contact has not been restored.
options.b: Reports indicate that the aircraft's remaining fuel should be considered exhausted.
options.c: Reports suggest the aircraft's operational capability has been compromised to the degree that a forced landing is probable.
options.d: An aircraft does not arrive within 30 minutes of the most recent ETA communicated to ATC.
